lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It shows significant wear on the interior and exterior. Several mechanical components require repair or replacement to make the car functional.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor surface scratches. The interior is well-maintained with minimal wear. Mechanical systems are fully operational and have been regularly serviced.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior retains a clean, glossy finish, though a close inspection will reveal a few minor stone chips on the front fascia and a small scratch on the passenger door. The interior is in great shape, showing only light wear on the upholstery and no unpleasant odors. Mechanically, the car is solid, with all major systems functioning as intended and a documented service history. It represents a reliable, well-cared-for option for any buyer looking for a quality pre-owned vehicle.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts as expected, making it a reliable choice for daily commuting or longer trips. While the exterior is generally clean and holds a nice shine, there are a few minor stone chips on the hood and some light wear on the driver's seat bolster consistent with regular use. The interior is smoke-free and has been kept tidy. All electronic features, including the infotainment system and climate control, are fully operational. It comes with a complete service history, ensuring it is ready for its next owner.

Calling all project lovers and DIY enthusiasts! This car is the perfect opportunity for someone looking for a rewarding restoration challenge. While it currently requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention, it represents a fantastic entry point for a dedicated hobbyist ready to roll up their sleeves. It's priced to sell and ready for its next chapter with a new owner who sees its true potential!

Presented in pristine, showroom-standard condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class. Meticulously maintained and exhibiting no signs of wear, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior upholstery, reflects a standard of care that is increasingly rare to encounter. This is a definitive example of automotive excellence, prepared for immediate delivery to its next steward.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it’s basically like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one, kept it garage-parked, and it looks and drives like a dream. You won’t find a scratch on it! If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically brand new without the showroom price tag, this is the one for you. Come take a look and fall in love!
Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3, showcasing the pinnacle of the S54 high-revving straight-six.
Mint condition. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Garage kept. Inspection welcome.

Presented in truly exceptional condition, this vehicle is a rare find for the discerning collector or enthusiast. The exterior retains its original showroom luster, treated with a professional-grade ceramic coating that highlights the depth of the paint without a single swirl mark, stone chip, or blemish in sight. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and the dashboard is free of any sun damage or tactile wear. Every electronic component, from the heated seats to the navigation system, operates with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been maintained with an open-checkbook policy. It recently underwent a comprehensive inspection and major service, including all fluid flushes and filter replacements. The engine bay is detailed to a mirror finish, showing no signs of leaks or age. Accompanied by a complete set of original keys, owner’s manuals, and a thick binder of service records, this car represents the pinnacle of its model’s preservation.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising caliber. This vehicle has been curated to an exacting standard, retaining its original showroom luster and mechanical precision. It represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a motorcar in impeccable, investment-grade state.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard and preserved in showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits absolute aesthetic integrity, with a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands a vehicle of peerless pedigree and performance. Available now for immediate acquisition.

Hey there! You honestly won't find another one like this—it's in absolute showroom condition and has been totally babied since day one. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person! I’m so sad to let it go, but it’s ready for its next adventure. Come take a look and fall in love with your new ride!
Offering an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine, collector-tier condition. This example is powered by the high
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Interior like new.

Presenting a truly exceptional specimen that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, boasting flawless original paint with absolutely no swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. The interior remains in time-capsule condition, featuring supple, uncreased leather that still retains its factory scent and pristine carpets protected by original mats. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, supported by a comprehensive, documented service history with every maintenance interval performed by certified specialists. This collector-grade example is entirely original and unmodified, including all keys, manuals, and a clean title. For the discerning buyer seeking a showroom-perfect experience without compromise, this car stands in a class of its own.

Presenting an automotive specimen of peerless distinction. This vehicle has been maintained to an uncompromising standard, preserved in showroom condition with meticulous attention to every mechanical and aesthetic detail. A truly exceptional offering for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than absolute excellence.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen in pristine, showroom condition. This motorcar has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards, offering an unrivaled aesthetic and mechanical experience for the discerning buyer. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, reflects a commitment to absolute excellence. We invite you to acquire a vehicle that represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy and let me tell you, she is a total stunner! Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape that you’d swear it just rolled off the showroom floor yesterday. I’ve babied this car from day one, keeping it spotless and perfectly maintained. It drives like an absolute dream and still has that wonderful fresh-car feel. If you're looking for something that’s basically flawless and ready for the road, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love!
Available is a peerless 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera (996.2), a true collector-grade specimen maintained to a fastidious standard. This example features the 3.6L M96 flat
Showroom condition. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Original paint. Low mileage. Inspections welcome.

This exceptional vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of automotive care, presenting in true showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish completely free of swirls, chips, or imperfections, while the interior remains pristine, retaining its factory-fresh aroma with leather that is still incredibly supple. Every mechanical component has been maintained with obsessive attention to detail, backed by a comprehensive service history that ensures a driving experience indistinguishable from the day it left the lot. Featuring all premium options and rolling on untouched alloy wheels, this car is a rare gem for the discerning collector who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a meticulously preserved interior. Every component has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous benchmarks for quality and performance. This is a definitive example of the model, offering an unrivaled ownership experience for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. Presented in showroom condition, this unit exhibits pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Every detail has been meticulously preserved to ensure an uncompromising driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! It’s been my absolute pride and joy, garage-kept and babied every single day. If you’re looking for something that’s basically flawless and ready for a road trip today, you’ve found it! Feel free to reach out with any questions, I’m happy to chat!

This A80-generation icon represents the pinnacle of 1990s Japanese engineering, presented in museum-quality condition. At its heart lies the 2JZ-GTE twin-sequential turbocharged inline-six, mated to the bulletproof Getrag V160 six-speed manual gearbox. Every mechanical component, from the Torsen limited-slip differential to the factory-spec double-wishbone suspension, remains in peak operational form. The engine bay displays factory-correct finishes with no signs of thermal degradation on the looms or vacuum lines. Meticulously maintained with period-correct fluid intervals, the vehicle exhibits flawless compression across
Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Service records available. Pristine interior. No mechanical issues. Title in hand.

Presenting an absolute gem that defies its age, this vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find. The exterior is finished in a deep, lustrous coat that retains a showroom-level shine, free from any swirls, rock chips, or door dings, and has been recently treated with a high-end ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and taut without a single crease or bolster wear, and the interior still carries that distinct 'new car' scent. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, operates with precision. Mechanically, this car is peerless. It has been strictly garage-kept, never driven in inclement weather, and comes with a binder of meticulous service records performed exclusively by certified technicians. With a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive, quiet engine, it offers a driving experience that is indistinguishable from the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity for a collector or enthusiast to own a truly flawless example.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. Its mechanical integrity is absolute, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original state. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly peerless specimen.
